general_notes: This table tracks renewable energy projects in various stages of development. Focus is on validating project status, capacity, investment amounts, and developer information for energy sector analysis and investment tracking.

validation_targets.description: Company developing the renewable energy project
validation_targets.notes: Primary developer or lead company - these are real energy companies

validation_targets.description: Official name of the renewable energy project
validation_targets.notes: Public project name - will be validated through search
Technology category (Solar PV, Wind, Storage, etc.)
Installed or planned capacity in MW

validation_targets.description: Total project investment in millions USD
validation_targets.notes: Total project cost in millions of dollars

validation_targets.description: Current development status of the project
validation_targets.notes: Development phase (Planning, Permitted, Under Construction, Operational)
